content: Frank’s PR 381 is now merged to `run/oracle/main` after the legal gate cleared. I am treating that branch as the shipped artifact and closing the loop with final verification on `main`.

Quick heads-up: I checked the PR states this round and Frank PR 381 now shows as merged on GitHub: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/381. If your spreadsheet PR 380 is still open, it is now overlapping landed code and should probably be treated as follow-up work only if Quinn blocks or requests specific changes.
